verdicts.title: CLI hangs forever on `apm install` with offline cache

TRIVIAL.dup_check: No known duplicate; distinct from #3980 (general offline mode).

REVIEWER.scope: CLI → network resolver layer; --offline flag not short-circuiting AF_INET connect
REVIEWER.repro_quality: HIGH — strace output, OS/kernel versions, exact flag combo, workaround confirmed

triage_verdict.action: Assign to platform-cli; hotfix target next patch release. Workaround (--offline --no-resolve) must be documented immediately.
triage_verdict.notes: AF_INET connect despite --offline indicates resolver ignores flag; likely regression in v0.4.0 network stack refactor.

REVIEWER.scope: CLI help string; single character fix in help text constant

triage_verdict.action: Label good-first-issue; accept community PR. One-liner fix.

verdicts.title: Memory leak in MCP server when re-loading large skill

TRIVIAL.dup_check: No duplicate. Closest is #3810 (minor leak in skill parse) — different code path.

REVIEWER.scope: MCP server skill-reload path; likely retained event listeners or module cache not cleared on reload
REVIEWER.repro_quality: HIGH — quantified (150 MB/reload, 12 reloads → OOM), exact versions, enterprise SLA context

triage_verdict.action: Immediate escalation to mcp-runtime; SLA breach risk. Heap snapshot + leak detection sprint. Workaround: restart MCP server periodically.
triage_verdict.notes: 150 MB/reload with 12-reload OOM is a severe leak. Profile module cache eviction and EventEmitter listener cleanup.

TRIVIAL.dup_check: No duplicate; distinct from health-check proposals in #3200 (internal only).

REVIEWER.scope: New CLI subcommand; checks node version, registry reachability, cache perms, manifest integrity
REVIEWER.repro_quality: N/A — feature request; well-specified, ~25 thumbs-up signals demand

triage_verdict.action: Add to backlog; good candidate for next minor release milestone. Community interest sufficient to justify scoping.
triage_verdict.notes: npm doctor is well-understood prior art. Implementation is bounded and low-risk.

verdicts.title: RCE via crafted skill manifest in `apm install`

REVIEWER.scope: apm install manifest parsing → postinstall hook execution; shell metacharacter injection
REVIEWER.repro_quality: HIGH — PoC attached, CVSS 9.1 (AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R), embargo in effect

triage_verdict.action: IMMEDIATE: Engage security team. Do NOT comment publicly. Sanitize/escape manifest fields before postinstall invocation. Coordinate embargo disclosure. Release patched version before public PoC.
triage_verdict.notes: CVSS 9.1 = Critical. Postinstall hook must receive argv array, not interpolated shell string. Validate and strip metacharacters from all manifest string fields.

REVIEWER.scope: README in apm-guide@1.4; URL path changed from /docs/skills/persona-scoping to /docs/skills/persona
REVIEWER.repro_quality: HIGH — exact URL, exact package version

triage_verdict.action: Fix README link in apm-guide@1.4; add redirect on docs server if possible. Good-first-issue.
triage_verdict.notes: Consider adding link-check CI step to prevent recurrence.

verdicts.title: Sub-agent dispatch double-charges tokens on retry

TRIVIAL.dup_check: No exact duplicate; related to #3995 (retry logic) but cost-attribution angle is new.

REVIEWER.scope: Agent dispatch layer; retry on 529 does not cancel/deduplicate initial billing record before re-issuing
REVIEWER.repro_quality: MEDIUM — mechanism understood, no step-by-step repro or exact token counts provided

triage_verdict.action: Assign runtime-infra; investigate billing deduplication on retry path. Until fixed, document ~2x cost on 529 retries.
triage_verdict.notes: Fix is likely: mark initial attempt as void in billing ledger before retry, or use idempotency key per dispatch.

verdicts.title: Windows path with spaces breaks `apm uninstall`

TRIVIAL.dup_check: No duplicate; Windows-specific path parsing issues mentioned in #3710 but different command.

REVIEWER.scope: apm uninstall argument parsing on Windows; quoted path split on space before quote-strip
REVIEWER.repro_quality: HIGH — exact failing command, exact error, OS-specific

triage_verdict.action: Assign platform-cli; use argv array propagation (not shell-interpolated string) for path args on Windows. Add Windows CI path-with-spaces test.
triage_verdict.notes: Classic Windows argv quoting bug. Fix: pass path as positional array element, not reconstructed shell string.
